name: @holomem/core
description: Arkiv protocol layer — cryptographic memory mesh on Braga testnet

scripts.demo: node --env-file ../../.env dist/index.js "What are the critical challenges and opportunities facing decentralized AI infrastructure in 2026?"
scripts.demo:mock: node --env-file ../../.env dist/index.js --mock "What are the critical challenges and opportunities facing decentralized AI infrastructure in 2026?"
scripts.demo:openai: node --env-file ../../.env dist/index.js --provider openai "What are the critical challenges and opportunities facing decentralized AI infrastructure in 2026?"
scripts.demo:anthropic: node --env-file ../../.env dist/index.js --provider anthropic "What are the critical challenges and opportunities facing decentralized AI infrastructure in 2026?"
